case_title: MICHAEL TIBBETTS ET AL VS. CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIBBETTS, MICHAEL ROMINE, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-16-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TIBBETTS, MICHAEL ROMINE, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, AND WAIVED SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TIBBETTS, MICHAEL ROMINE, ERIN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIBBETTS, MICHAEL ROMINE, ERIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
